title: Thirandhen Thirandhen Lyrics Vandhaan Vendraan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Aaalaap Raju, Shreya Goshal
Lyrics: Kaarky
Song: Thirandhen Thirandhen

Thirandhen Thirandhen, nee mutti thirandhen
Ennulle ne vandhu,thee moota thiradhen
Uraindhe urangum, ennulle cellellam
Oppikum un perai, nee ketka thiranden

Thozhai thozhai ena, ennai naane kettu kondene
En mamadhayile,
Nuzhai nuzhai unnai ena, naane maatri kondene
En sarithayile..

Thulai yethum illaatha thaen koodo
Nulaivedhum illatha un kaado
Vilaivedhum illatha maanaado
Un idhayamena ninaithirundhen,poidhaana !!!...

Thirandhen Thirandhen, nee mutti thirandhen
Ennulle ne vandhu,thee moota thiradhen
Uraindhe urangum, ennule cellellam
Oppikum un perai, nee ketka thiranden

Mugathinai thirudinaai, thirai kadhaipadi..
Agathinai varudinaai, athai kadaipidi
Penne unnai thuravi endru thaan,
Innal varai kulambi poyinen
thuravaram, thurakiren ...

Thulai yethum illaatha thaen koodo ..........
Thirandhen Thirandhen, nee mutti thirandhen....

Getup Getup Getup Getup,Getup Getup Getup
Getup Getup Getup Getup,Getup Getup Getup

Urimaigal valanginen, udai varai thodu
Marungugal meeriye, madai udaithidu
Oraayiram iravil serthathai,
Or-eer nodi eraval ketkiraaai,
Porumayin sigarame !!......

Thulai yethum illaatha thaen koodo.........
Un idhayamena ninaithirundhen,poidhaana !!!...

Thirandhen Thirandhen, nee mutti thirandhen.......
Oppikum un perai, nee ketka thiranden

Sottu sottaga, un paarvai ennul iranga
Pattu pattaga,en rekkai rendu tholirka
Thitu thittaaga, un kadhal  ennam padiya
Sittu sittaaga, oru muthatheyil mudiya

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thirandhen Thirandhen?

The song conveys a deep sense of love and longing, expressing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

What is the plot context of the movie Vandhaan Vendraan?

The movie revolves around themes of love and adventure, showcasing the protagonist's journey through various challenges.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Aalap Raju and Shreya Goshal.

Who composed the music for Thirandhen Thirandhen?

The music for the song was composed by Thaman S.

When was Thirandhen Thirandhen released?

The song was released on July 23, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thirandhen Thirandhen, the protagonists express their love through a melodious duet that captures the essence of romance. The song's lyrics, penned by Karky, beautifully articulate the emotions of longing and affection. Set within the narrative of Vandhaan Vendraan, it enhances the romantic moments between the lead characters. The harmonious blend of Aalap Raju and Shreya Goshal's voices creates an enchanting atmosphere, making it a perfect choice for celebrations of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thirandhen Thirandhen from Vandhaan Vendraan is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully showcases the enchanting voices of Aalap Raju and Shreya Goshal. With Thaman S's melodious composition and Karky's heartfelt lyrics, this song resonates with love and joy. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that will surely tug at your heartstrings.
stanzaMeanings: I opened up, I opened up, you opened up. You came inside me, the fire didn't open. Everything that was asleep inside me is now awake. You called out my name, I opened up to hear you.
I called out to my friend, I took myself in. In my dreams, I changed you. In my history...
There is no honey that doesn't have a sting. There is no place without your absence. There is no deer without a place. I was thinking of your heart, it has gone away!!!...
I opened up, I opened up, you opened up. You came inside me, the fire didn't open. Everything that was asleep inside me is now awake. You called out my name, I opened up to hear you.
You stole my face, like a movie story. You stole my heart, like a secret. Girl, I have been longing for you, until now I have been waiting for you to open up...
There is no honey that doesn't have a sting. I opened up, I opened up, you opened up....
I opened up, I opened up, you opened up. I opened up to hear you.
You are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining, you are shining.
I have gained rights, until the end. The obstacles are removed, the barriers are broken. In a thousand nights, I have gathered. In one moment, I hear the call of patience!!......
There is no honey that doesn't have a sting. I was thinking of your heart, it has gone away!!!...
I opened up, I opened up, you opened up.... You called out my name, I opened up to hear you.
Slowly, slowly, your gaze is inside me. Slowly, slowly, my wings are two-fold. Gently, gently, your love is a song. Slowly, slowly, it can't be contained in a single pearl.
